# STRAT.041 ? Conscious Leadership

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** leadership_frameworks
**Domain:** LEADERSHIP_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Above/below the line; curiosity vs defensiveness; responsibility vs blame; commitment to learning; emotional intelligence; presence

## Application
Notice when below line; shift to curiosity; take responsibility; learn from everything; emotional awareness; be present; radical responsibility

## Key Values
- Above the line
- Curiosity
- Responsibility
- Learning commitment
- Presence

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, leadership_frameworks

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
